title: Unit tests for config module
description: Create tests/test_config.py with unittest test cases covering: (1) default_config() returns correct SchedulerConfig values (lease_timeout=30, max_corrective=2, followup_suffixes, corrective_suffix, transient patterns), (2) default_config() returns correct BackendConfig for codex and claude, (3) load_config with missing file returns default_config(), (4) load_config with valid YAML returns correct overrides, (5) load_config with malformed YAML raises, (6) backend() returns correct config and raises KeyError for unknown names, (7) allowed_tools_for('claude','developer') returns merged deduplicated list, (8) allowed_tools_for('claude','planner') returns only defaults, (9) allowed_tools_for('codex','developer') returns empty list, (10) dataclasses are frozen (assigning raises FrozenInstanceError), (11) partial YAML overrides merge correctly with defaults. Use tempfile/tmp_path for test config files.
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_config.py exists and uses unittest framework
All tests pass via uv run python -m unittest tests.test_config -v
Tests cover load_config with missing file, valid file, malformed file
Tests cover default_config() returning correct defaults
Tests cover backend() happy path and KeyError
Tests cover allowed_tools_for() merge logic for claude and codex
All existing tests continue to pass
